title: Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Check Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 for all semesters. Download OU BBA exam schedule, date sheet, and updates for regular & backlog exams. Stay updated with official OU exam dates, timings, and notifications.

sections.heading: Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 OUT

content.text: Osmania University has officially released the BBA Semester III Backlog and Re-Admission examinations time table for April 2026. The revised timetable is now available for students of the 2021-22 batch onwards. Students can check the complete schedule on the official website ou.ac.in and download the PDF for easy reference.

The examinations are scheduled to begin from 16 April 2026 and will conclude on 22 April 2026. Candidates must carry their hall tickets and follow all guidelines mentioned in the official notice. Verify all details carefully and contact the Examination Branch in case of any discrepancy.
Download Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 PDF

sections.heading: Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 Overview

content.text: Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 provides the complete schedule for Semester III Backlog and Re-Admission examinations. The revised timetable covers theory papers for BBA Regular (CBCS) students. All exams will be conducted in the forenoon session from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM.

sections.heading: Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: Here is the detailed subject-wise Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 for Semester III Backlog examinations. The revised schedule includes English, Second Languages, Skill Enhancement Course, and core management subjects. Students are advised to prepare according to the dates mentioned below.

rows: Second Languages* (Telugu, Hindi, Sanskrit, Urdu, Arabic, French, Kannada, Marathi, Persian and Tamil)
Introduction to Information Technology (60 MARKS) / Information Technology for Business (60 MARKS)

content.text: Note: Any omission or clash may be intimated to the Controller of Examinations, Osmania University. Candidates must write the examination in the allotted centers only.

sections.heading: How to Download Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 from the official university portal. The process is simple and requires only a few clicks. Follow the steps below to get your copy instantly.

items: Visit the official website of Osmania University at ou.ac.in.
Navigate to the Examination section and look for the Time Table or Notifications link.
Search for BBA Semester III Backlog April 2026 Revised Time Table.
Click on the relevant PDF link to open the document.
Download the timetable PDF and save it on your device.
Take a printout for quick reference during exam preparation.

content.text: Make sure to check the official timetable carefully and keep a printed copy handy for your exam preparation. Always refer to the latest updates from the university.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026

content.text: The Osmania University BBA Time Table 2026 contains all essential information regarding the upcoming Semester III Backlog examinations. Students can find clear details about dates, subjects, and important instructions in the official document.

items: Examination Name: BBA Regular (CBCS) Semester-III Backlog & Re-Admission Examinations, April 2026
Revised Time Table status and release information
Exam dates and corresponding days of the week
Subjects with paper titles for 2021-22 batch onwards
Examination timings: 10.00 A.M. to 1.00 P.M.
List of Second Languages offered
Important notes and guidelines for candidates
Instructions regarding examination centers and hall tickets
Rules about mobile phones and electronic gadgets
Signature and seal of the Controller of Examinations
